title: AI + Robotics: The Intersection
description: Why AI changes everything in robotics. The perception-planning-action loop revisited.

title: Computer Vision for Robots
description: Image pipelines, object detection with YOLOv8, semantic segmentation, real-time inference.

title: SLAM: Mapping Unknown Worlds
description: Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping from scratch. EKF-SLAM, particle filters, graph SLAM.

title: Reinforcement Learning for Control
description: MDP, Q-learning, PPO for continuous robot control. Train a robot to walk in simulation.

title: Edge Inference & Deployment
description: TensorRT, ONNX, quantisation. Run models at 60fps on Jetson Nano and Raspberry Pi.

title: Multi-Modal Sensor Fusion
description: Combine camera, lidar, and IMU into a coherent world model. Kalman filter deep dive.

title: Autonomous System Architecture
description: Behaviour trees, state machines, mission planners. How real autonomous systems are structured.

title: Research Capstone
description: Design and implement an original AI robotics system. Peer review + R2BOT team evaluation.
